claim_results.claim: The entropy activated at the Fall requires negentropy injected from outside the closed system to reverse it.
Quantum mechanics: If a system has decohered, re-establishing coherence requires coupling the system to a coherence source that is itself uncorrupted.
Full restoration requires the sender.

6 Made death the default trajectory — mortality becomes the terminal state Every physical body decays; entropy wins every biological contest Beat death physically — bodily resurrection Demonstrates that the substrate can be repaired; death is not the final eigenstate 1 Cor 15:54–55 7 Fragmented consciousness — broke the unified awareness of the divine presence Humans experience separation from God; presence becomes intermittent, effortful, uncertain Restored presence — "Today you will be with me in paradise"
If the Resurrection is only spiritual — if Jesus' body stayed in the tomb while his "spirit" ascended — then the substrate-level damage remains unrepaired.
Remove it and the entire structure of substrate-level repair collapses, because the damage was physical and the fix was not.
Article 07 showed that the Spirit actualizes without temporal constraint — the Cross reaches backward and forward because the Lamb was slain from the foundation of the world.
He is declaring that the restoration is immediate because, from the eternal frame, there is no gap between the moment of coupling and the completion of repair.
If the error-correction protocol requires credentials, he breaks it.
If it requires progressive sanctification before access is granted, he breaks it.
0 Credentials Required for Grace — The Thief Proves It This is what grace looks like in the equations.
The Grace term $G$ in the Master Equation is not earned.
If any row operates at a different level — if the counter is shallower than the attack — the symmetry claim fails for that row, and the entire thesis weakens proportionally.

If historical evidence ever conclusively demonstrated that the Resurrection did not involve a physical body, the framework's substrate-repair model would be falsified — because the physical damage would remain unaddressed.
Entropy reversal requires external negentropy.
Decoherence reversal requires external coherence.
Signal restoration requires the original signal.
Paul stakes the entire Christian claim on a physical resurrection.
This is a direct test of whether the error-correction protocol requires anything from the receiver beyond coupling with the source.
But "exact" implies a mathematical precision we have not formalized.
The comparative claim is narrower than the sentence we wrote.
But it implies that the substrate of reality is simple — a slab, a foundation, something a guy with a truck can assess.

Q0 Posture 0.82 Q1 Identity 0.85 Q2 Domain 0.80 Q3 Assertion 0.88 Q4 Evidence 0.68 Q5 Dependencies 0.70 Q6 Consequences 0.82 Q7 Falsification 0.75 T-Score: 0.74 | CKG: 7.3/10 | Tier: Provisional | Type: Bridge (Physics ↔ Theology) F (Find): Every move the adversary makes in Genesis 3 has an exact structural counter in the Cross and Resurrection — not approximate, not thematic, exact.
C (Claim): The Cross operates at substrate level because the Fall broke reality at substrate level.

If the Atonement is purely spiritual, purely moral, or purely psychological — if it does not address the physical substrate that the Fall damaged — then the symmetry requirement is violated and the seven-row table collapses.
This is the single most testable claim in the article.

If Jesus' body remained in the tomb — if the Resurrection is metaphor, vision, or spiritual ascent without bodily transformation — then Row 6 fails, the substrate remains unrepaired, and Paul's warning in 1 Corinthians 15:17 applies: faith is futile and sin remains uncovered.
Every model is a projection of higher-dimensional reality onto a lower-dimensional surface we can comprehend.
We do not claim to have captured God in equations.
We claim that when we look at His creation honestly — with the tools of physics and the revelation of Scripture — the same structure appears in both.
Where our model limits what God can be, the limitation is ours, not His.
If they are, then the Fall is not a myth that physics must ignore, and the Cross is not a doctrine that physics cannot reach.
They are the two events that define the substrate — the break and the repair — and every equation in between is the scar or the stitch.
The honest audit sections throughout these articles have named every gap, every overreach, every place where the argument exceeds the evidence.
Any claim that turns a structural resemblance into a proven mechanism belongs here until the math, experiment, or textual chain can carry the weight.
Possible overstatement: language that sounds final should be read as a working model unless the article explicitly proves it.

The Resurrection must be physical because the damage was physical; if Christ's body stayed in the tomb, Row 6 fails and 1 Cor 15:17 applies — "your faith is futile and you are still in your sins." The thief on the cross is the framework's extreme test case: zero credentials, no time remaining, one honest signal — "remember me" — and Jesus declares the channel restored "today" ( semeron ), an eternal-frame word that breaks time.
Rigor & Kill Conditions Every claim is held to explicit falsification standards.

Kill if: Any single row of the 7-row symmetry table is shown to operate at a different structural level than the attack it answers — i.e., the counter is shallower or different in kind from the break, weakening the symmetry claim proportionally.

If the Atonement is purely spiritual, purely moral, or purely psychological — if it does not address the physical substrate that the Fall damaged — then the symmetry requirement is violated and the entire seven-row substrate-repair model collapses.
Every equation referenced in the paper, collected as a single index.
Master Equation (referenced) $$\chi = \iiint (G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C) \, dx \, dy \, dt$$ Plain English: the framework reference equation.
Reversing the Fall’s entropy term requires negentropy injected from outside the closed system.
The article’s claim is that the Fall fractured this layer, not the layers above it.
Each row is testable independently.
Same Master-Equation variable, two coordinate names: “entropy” in the physics frame, “sin” in the theological frame.
Cannot be reversed from inside the decohered system; requires coupling to an uncorrupted source.
The historical claim attached to the physical-resurrection requirement.
Master Equation (χ) The framework reference: $\chi = \iiint(G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C)\,dx\,dy\,dt$.
Cross-referenced here as the equation the Cross operates on.
Tracks Find / Admit / Claim / Test / Snap with calibrated scores per dimension.
The framework’s rating for this article: structurally clean but not yet formalized to the point where every claim can be called proven.

Logos Field ($\chi$) The pervasive substrate of coherent reality — the framework's $\chi$ field; the Master-Equation field whose value is total system coherence. (Earlier drafts denoted this with $\Lambda$; that symbol is now reserved for the cosmological constant.) Field ≠ coupling : this entry locks the substrate sense.
